summary: Gruber announces the release of SmartyPants 1.2.1, a minor bug fix update that resolves Perl 5.005 compatibility issues and Blosxom static mode problems. He also notes the coincidental same-day release of BBEdit 7.0.3 from Bare Bones Software, which fixes text encoding bugs affecting Unix filters and scripts. The BBEdit update specifically resolves issues that affected running SmartyPants as a filter in the previous BBEdit version.
key_points: SmartyPants 1.2.1 fixes a Perl compatibility issue where a POSIX-style regex character class required Perl 5.6+
The update also fixes compatibility with Blosxom in static rendering mode
BBEdit 7.0.3 released the same day fixes text encoding bugs with Unix filters that affected SmartyPants integration
money_quotes: This is a minor update, consisting primarily of small bug fixes for compatibility with Perl 5.005.
key_insight: A straightforward release announcement for SmartyPants 1.2.1 and a note on a complementary BBEdit bug fix that resolved SmartyPants integration issues.
